title: arrhenatherum bulbosum var. precatorium
intro: Arrhenatherum bulbosum var. precatorium, also known as the sweet grass, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family that is native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of sweet grass include soothing digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and aiding in wound healing. Herbal preparations of sweet grass include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or externally to harness its medicinal properties.
